mnemonics: LINE UP: Linearity, Independence, Normality, Equal variance (homoscedasticity), Uncorrelated predictors, Perfect model (no omitted variables)
keyPoints: Residual plots are used to check for non-linearity, heteroscedasticity, and outliers.
Influential points can disproportionately affect the regression model and are identified using measures like Cook's Distance.
Multicollinearity, high correlation between predictors, inflates variance of coefficient estimates and is checked with VIF.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on R-squared without checking if regression assumptions are violated.
Removing outliers without investigating if they are valid data points or errors.
Ignoring multicollinearity because the model's predictive performance seems acceptable.
